headline: The Boring Sector Quietly Powering the Entire AI Revolution
summary: Everyone wants to own NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA). Almost nobody talks about who pours the concrete, runs the wires, and keeps the chips from melting. That’s where we’ve been spending most of our research time over the past 18 months, and three names keep surfacing: Eaton, Vertiv, and Quanta Services. Here’s the setup. AI hyperscalers are now ... The Boring Sector Quietly Powering the Entire AI Revolution

headline: Watch These 5 Non-Tech Stocks Thriving in 2026 on AI Data Center Boom
summary: ETN, CAT, FCX, GEV and AA are five non-tech stocks benefiting from rising power, infrastructure and metal demand for AI data centers.

headline: Is Eaton Corporation Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Eaton Corporation stock has slightly lagged the broader S&P 500 over the past year, but analysts remain fairly bullish about its prospects.
